title: iberis intermedia var. lamottei
intro: Iberis intermedia var. lamottei, also known as dwarf candytuft or rock candytuft, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iberis intermedia var. lamottei include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and aiding in the treatment of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
